tasks.subject: Rust switch_dev_build + DevBuild.manifest_url, remove install_dev_build
acceptanceCriteria: DevBuild.manifest_url set from latest.json asset (None when absent)
parse_dev_builds populates manifest_url; parse test asserts it
install_dev_build removed (both arms) + unregistered
switch_dev_build builds updater w/ always-true comparator, installs, app.restart()
cargo test dev_builds passes + cargo check clean

tasks.subject: CI — publish per-build latest.json manifest + attach signatures
acceptanceCriteria: publish-updater.sh optional 3rd arg sets manifest version; omitted = byte-identical
Upload build artifacts captures **/*.sig
publish-dev find copies *.sig into dist
publish-dev runs publish-updater.sh with version override → latest.json attached
build.yml valid YAML + publish-updater.sh bash -n valid
release/tag path unchanged

tasks.subject: Frontend — DevBuildsCard redesign (rows + search + Downloads disclosure + updater switch)
acceptanceCriteria: search filters by PR#/sha/title (case-insensitive)
clean two-column rows; CURRENT tag non-wrapping; platform links behind Downloads disclosure
Switch shown when manifest_url present + not current; calls switch_dev_build({manifestUrl})
newest-first preserved; list scrolls within max-height
empty/error/retry preserved; no silent-skip
DevBuildsCard tests pass + i18n parity green

tasks.subject: DEV title-bar badge
acceptanceCriteria: dev version → DEV badge in titlebar next to title
release version → no badge
App tests pass

tasks.subject: DEV-badged Windows icon (build-time)
acceptanceCriteria: badgeIcons badges the 3 windows PNGs + rebuilds non-empty icon.ico
idempotent on re-run
missing source png skipped with warning, no crash
dev stamp step runs it only on the Windows leg after --stamp
make-dev-icon test passes + build.yml parses

tasks.subject: Manual Windows end-to-end verification (USER GATE)
tasks.verifyCommand: (manual, Windows) one-click Switch → silent swap+relaunch (version changes); Test-Path %APPDATA%\sts2-mod-manager-dev = True; release dir unchanged; DEV titlebar badge + DEV taskbar icon visible
acceptanceCriteria: Dev Builds list clean/aligned, newest-first, working search, Downloads disclosure
one-click Switch: no installer UI, silent download+swap+relaunch into target (version changes)
after switch uses sts2-mod-manager-dev; release dir untouched
dev app shows DEV titlebar badge + DEV-badged taskbar/desktop icon
release build: no Dev Builds section, no DEV badge, normal update behavior
